title: The Fabulous Adventures of Baron Munchausen
original_title: Les Fabuleuses Aventures du légendaire baron de Münchausen
overview: The Fabulous Adventures of the legendary Baron Munchausen is a French animated feature from Jean Image of 1978, inspired by the adventures of Baron Munchausen. Baron Munchausen is wont to bring his friends to tell them about his imaginary exploits.
